summary: Frontend-only IIoT SaaS app tested end-to-end across all 5 roles (Super Admin, Police, Ambulance, Fire, Hospital) plus auth flows (login/signup/OTP/forgot). All major features work as specified. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: lib/auth.js: passwords stored in plaintext in DEMO_ACCOUNTS array — acceptable for demo/MVP but flag as MOCKED.
All app data is mock (mockData.js + localStorage). No backend persistence — clearly MOCKED.
Sidebar.jsx uses NavLink with computed data-testid based on label.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'-'), so e.g. nav-roles-&-permissions contains '&' which is unusual but does not break tests.
DashboardLayout renders <Toaster /> twice (once in App.js root and once per layout). Not a bug, but redundant — could remove the inner Toaster.
OTPVerification: typing via keyboard without focusing the InputOTP slot does not register; works fine when the slot is clicked first. UX acceptable; not a defect.
test_credentials: All 5 demo credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md verified working.
seed_data_creation: None — all data is in-source mockData.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: First iteration. Frontend-only React app. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL as base. All routes are client-side. Verified flows: login (all 5 roles), demo quick-fill, role guards, sidebar navigation across all 13 admin pages + role-specific pages, Incidents View dialog, Services tabs + Onboard dialog, Police accept/reject + active case stage buttons + Reports chart, Ambulance accept + Start trip/Pick patient/Reach hospital, Fire accept + active incidents stage buttons + Reports chart, Hospital incoming patients table + Bed Management ICU/General/Emergency + Active Cases Assign dialog, Leaflet maps render on Admin Dashboard / Live Monitoring / Police Active / Ambulance Active / Fire Active, Signup -> OTP (123456) -> /login, Forgot password toast + redirect to /login, Cross-role guard (police -> /admin redirects to /police, super_admin -> /police redirects to /admin), Logout returns to /login. NO console errors observed.
tests_passed: Login page loads with demo accounts panel
Login as Super Admin redirects to /admin and Master Control dashboard renders with Leaflet map
All 13 Super Admin sidebar pages render without errors
Incidents View dialog opens with breakdown
Services Management tabs (Police/Hospitals/Fire/Ambulance) switch and Onboard dialog opens
Police Active Cases stage buttons present (On the way, etc.) and Leaflet renders
Police Reports renders with recharts chart
Ambulance Accept works; Active Trips has Start trip/Pick patient/Reach hospital buttons; Leaflet renders
Fire Accept works; Active Incidents has Dispatch team/On the way/Fire controlled/Close case buttons; Leaflet renders; Reports chart renders
Hospital Incoming Patients table with Accept/Redirect; Bed Management shows ICU/General/Emergency cards with progress bars; Active Cases Assign dialog opens
Signup form submits and routes to /otp
OTP code 123456 enables submit button (verified disabled state toggles on length=6)
Forgot password shows toast and redirects to /login
Cross-role guard: police -> /admin redirects to /police; super_admin -> /police redirects to /admin
